Best matches from the recipe library:
- Chicken and Ginger Stir Fry / 姜丝炒鸡 — Source: recipe KB. You already have: broccoli, rice. Need to buy: chicken thigh, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, vegetable oil. This is close to what you have, but it uses chicken thigh instead of breast.
- Chicken Pad See Ew / 泰式鸡肉炒河粉 — Source: recipe KB. You already have: chicken breast, broccoli. Need to buy: dark soy sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, fish sauce, wide rice noodles, eggs, garlic, white pepper, cooking oil. Note: fish sauce is often not halal unless certified, so only use this if you have a halal-certified version or a substitute.
- Chicken and Bok Choy Stir-Fry / 鸡肉炒青菜 — Source: recipe KB. You already have: rice. Need to buy: chicken wings, bok choy, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, vegetable oil, cornstarch. Also not a perfect fit for your chicken breast.

If you want the lowest-effort dinner, I’d recommend making your own halal chicken, broccoli, and rice stir-fry using your chicken breast plus:
- garlic and ginger
- halal soy sauce
- a little honey or sugar
- optional sesame oil and cornstarch for better coating

That would use what you already have and fix the sauce gap without buying much.

If you want, I can next turn this into:
1. a one-pan halal dinner plan for tonight, or
2. a grocery list with exact store-grounded items from Costco."}}, {"event_type": "done", "data": {"event_type": "done", "status": "complete", "reason": null, "error_category": null, "token_usage": {"prompt_tokens": 9186, "completion_tokens": 496, "total_tokens": 9682, "cached_tokens": 8704, "cache_write_tokens": 0, "cost": 0.0032463, "model": "openai/gpt-5.4-mini-20260317"}}}], "recipe_cards": [{"event_type": "recipe_card", "recipe": {"id": "r010", "name": "Chicken and Ginger Stir Fry", "name_zh": "姜丝炒鸡", "cuisine": "Asian", "cooking_method": "stir-fry", "effort_level": "medium", "flavor_tags": ["aromatic", "tangy", "savory"], "serves": 2, "pcsv_roles": {"protein": ["chicken thigh"], "veggie": ["ginger", "garlic", "broccoli"], "sauce": ["soy sauce", "rice vinegar", "honey"], "carb": ["rice"]}, "ingredients_have": ["broccoli", "rice"], "ingredients_need": ["chicken thigh", "ginger", "garlic", "soy sauce", "rice vinegar", "honey", "vegetable oil"], "ingredients": [{"name": "chicken thigh", "amount": "1 lb", "pcsv": ["protein"]}, {"name": "ginger", "amount": "2 inches", "pcsv": ["veggie"]}, {"name": "garlic", "amount": "3 cloves", "pcsv": ["veggie"]}, {"name": "soy sauce", "amount": "2 tbsp", "pcsv": ["sauce"]}, {"name": "rice vinegar", "amount": "1 tbsp", "pcsv": ["sauce"]}, {"name": "honey", "amount": "1 tbsp", "pcsv": ["sauce"]}, {"name": "broccoli", "amount": "1 cup", "pcsv": ["veggie"]}, {"name": "rice", "amount": "for serving", "pcsv": ["carb"]}, {"name": "vegetable oil", "amount": "2 tbsp", "pcsv": []}], "instructions": "Slice chicken thigh into strips.
